## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? Keep it concise. -->

## Related Issues

<!-- Link issues, e.g. "Closes #123" or "Refs #123". -->

Closes #

## Type of Change

<!-- Put an `x` in all the boxes that apply. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation only
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / chore (no functional change)
- [ ] 🧪 Tests only

## Checklist

<!-- All items should be checked before requesting review. -->

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`python3 runtests.py`)
- [ ] I added/updated tests covering my change
- [ ] `pdm@djangoGauth lint` and `pdm@djangoGauth mypy` are clean
- [ ] Documentation under `docs/` is updated (for user-facing changes)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated (for notable changes)
- [ ] My PR is focused on a single logical change
- [ ] I did **not** include any real secrets (client IDs/secrets, tokens, auth codes)

## How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and any relevant environment (Python/Django versions). -->

## Additional Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots, etc. -->
